'''鈭歬-s-f-k''' ('''kakasfekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dag|dag]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-s-f-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dag|dag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-s-f-k
|-
! Lemma
| kakasfekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikasfekoko|thikasfekoko]] || [[word:jikasfekoko|jikasfekoko]] || [[word:shikasfekoko|shikasfekoko]] || [[word:kikasfekoko|kikasfekoko]]
